items.title: Gasparilla Invitational week: Monday qualifier today; main event starts Thursday (Feb 19–21)
items.why: For mid-ams, the Monday qualifier is the chance to play their way into the event! And the official schedule/scoring hub is the reliable place to track pairings/results.

items.title: Gasparilla 2026 scoring hub (live scoring / pairings)
items.why: This is the canonical live link for the week. We’ll use it for daily updates so readers aren’t bouncing through old “qualifier” pages from prior years.

items.title: AJGA Simplify Boys Championship at Carlton Woods: final day scoring watch
items.why: This one wraps today. Cameron Kuchar is currently leading at -11, so the question is whether he can close or if someone in the chase pack makes a run.

items.title: Senior competitive: Mallon leads Spring Classic winners at Aileron
items.why: This is the senior version of early-season signal—steady scoring now usually means a strong run once the calendar fills up.
